hero.subtitle: Track your shipment instantly. No account needed.
hero.placeholder: Enter your tracking number — e.g.: CVP-2024-0001
hero.loginCtaPost: to see the full history of your shipments.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Everything you need to manage your shipments
services.subtitle: We offer complete logistics solutions for individuals and businesses, with real-time tracking technology.

items.title: International Mailbox
items.desc: We assign you a US address so you can buy from any online store and we bring it directly to your door.

items.title: National Transport
items.desc: Door-to-door pickup and delivery throughout the national territory. Real-time tracking from the moment of dispatch.

items.title: Customs Management
items.desc: We handle the entire import process: tariffs, documentation, and cargo clearance.

items.title: Cargo Consolidation
items.desc: We group several packages into a single shipment to reduce freight costs and streamline imports.

items.title: Express Delivery
items.desc: Priority service with reduced delivery times for urgent shipments, with hourly tracking.

items.title: Corporate Portal
items.desc: Multi-user access for businesses: manage all your shipments, generate reports and control costs from one panel.

about.label: About Us
about.title: We connect the world to your door
about.p1: We are a logistics company with over 10 years of experience in the import and transport of goods. Our mission is to simplify global commerce so that anyone can access products from around the world safely and efficiently.
about.p2: With our own technology, we offer our customers total visibility over their shipments — from the moment they leave the warehouse to when they arrive in their hands.
about.missionSub: Making global commerce accessible to everyone

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: We are here to help you
contact.subtitle: Have a question about your shipments or want to know our services? Write to us and we will respond within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Reliable logistics solutions for individuals and businesses. We connect the world to your door.

tracking.loginCta: Are you the recipient? Sign in to see full details, comments and proof of delivery.
